_comment: Source of truth for the branch protection config applied to `main` on github.com/feastpot/feastpot-platform. Apply with: curl -X PUT -H 'Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN' -H 'Accept: application/vnd.github+json' --data @.github/branch-protection.main.json https://api.github.com/repos/feastpot/feastpot-platform/branches/main/protection
_required_checks_note: Two groups of required checks. (1) PR-time checks from .github/workflows/ci.yml — these run on every pull_request and gate merges normally. (2) Post-merge deploy checks from .github/workflows/deploy.yml — these only run on push to main, so they will keep PRs in 'blocked' mergeable state until deploy.yml is also wired to run on pull_request, OR until an admin bypasses the requirement (enforce_admins=false makes this possible for solo-dev recovery). Documented in docs/git-workflow.md and docs/git-workflow-verification.md.
